slides.prompt: Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Very dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin all sides. Top: bold red #E63946 stripe full width + COMPACT white text '야외활동 알레르기 긴급 가이드'. Top-right below stripe: 소아과언니 white Pretendard SemiBold small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Headline COMPACT 25% smaller: '우리 아이' white bold, '안전하게 놀게 하려면' bright red #E63946. Small white subtitle: '꽃가루·곰팡이 노출 대처 · AAP 가이드라인 기준'. LARGE prominent line illustration child playing outdoors with pollen particles in air, white outline on dark background, centered. Bottom-left small gray: 'PARENTING NOTE · 011'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '알레르기 증상 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '야외 알레르겐이' white, '이런 증상 유발' red #E63946. Center: SMALL LINE ILLUSTRATION pollen and mold spores white outline. Below: four symptom cards stacked vertically dark #1A2B3C background GENEROUS spacing, each card: SMALL ICON left (red warning symbol) + COMPACT white text right: '콧물·재채기', '코막힘', '눈 가려움증', '기침'. Red outlined box around all cards comfortable padding. Bottom small gray: '출처: 질병관리청 국가건강정보포털'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '피해야 할 시간 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '꽃가루가 가장 많은' white, '이른 아침 5시-10시' red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION sunrise with clock and pollen particles white outline. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding: large red bold '5AM-10AM' + white text '이 시간대 야외활동 최소화'. Below box: small white text '비 온 후는 꽃가루 농도 감소 → 야외활동 좋은 시간'. Bottom thin white divider + small gray '출처: CHKD Health Library'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '귀가 후 필수 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '몸에 묻은 알레르겐' white, '즉시 제거하세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION child showering white outline. Below: three action cards stacked dark #1A2B3C GENEROUS spacing, each: SMALL ICON left (mint checkmark) + COMPACT white text right: '샤워·목욕으로 몸 씻기', '머리카락 감기', '실내 창문 닫고 에어컨 사용'. Mint outlined box around all cards. Bottom small gray: '출처: AAP HealthyChildren.org'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '피해야 할 활동 ❌'. Headline COMPACT: '알레르겐 노출' white, '높이는 야외활동' red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION lawn mower and leaf pile white outline red X overlay. Below: two prohibition cards stacked GENEROUS spacing dark #1A2B3C: each card SMALL ICON left (red X) + COMPACT white text right: '잔디 깎기 근처 놀이 금지', '낙엽 더미에서 놀이 금지'. Red outlined box around cards. Bottom area: small white text '비 온 후 = 안전한 야외활동 시간'. Bottom thin divider + small gray '출처: AAP HealthyChildren.org'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '약물 사용법 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '증상 예방하려면' white, '미리 복용하세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION medicine bottle and clock showing 30min white outline. Below: mint outlined box GENEROUS padding: large mint bold '30분 전' + white text '야외활동 최소 30분 전 알레르기 약물 복용'. Below: dark card #1A2B3C rounded: white small bold '비강 코르티코스테로이드' + white text '가장 효과적인 1차 치료제 · 매일 사용 시 최대 효과'. Bottom small gray: '출처: CHKD · PubMed 2022'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left mint rounded label: '예방 전략 ✓'. Headline COMPACT: '꽃가루 농도 예보' white, '확인하세요' mint #2EC4B6. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION smartphone with pollen forecast app white outline. Below: two action cards stacked dark #1A2B3C GENEROUS spacing, each: SMALL ICON left (mint checkmark) + COMPACT white text right: '지역 꽃가루 농도 매일 확인', '꽃가루 많은 날 → 실내 활동 계획'. Mint outlined box around cards. Bottom small gray: '출처: AAP HealthyChildren.org'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy background #0D1B2A. GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-left red rounded label: '전문의 진료 시점 🏥'. Headline COMPACT: '이럴 땐 반드시' white, '소아청소년과 방문' red #E63946. Center: LARGE LINE ILLUSTRATION doctor consultation scene white outline. Below: red outlined box GENEROUS padding, three numbered items stacked: red number circle + white text GENEROUS spacing: '1. 증상이 조절되지 않을 때', '2. 일상생활에 지장 줄 때', '3. 알레르기 검사로 원인 확인 필요 시'. Bottom dark card #1A2B3C: mint text '면역치료 3-5년 시행 → 장기 개선 + 천식 예방'. Bottom small gray: '출처: AAP Pediatrics In Review 2023'. No pixel values. No quotes.

Portrait 1080x1350 vertical. Emergency alert style. Dark navy #0D1B2A. VERY GENEROUS outer margin. Top-right: 소아과언니 white small, no quotes, 4 characters only. Top-center small gray: 'SAVE & SHARE'. Headline COMPACT: '오늘 확인하고' white, '저장하세요' mint #2EC4B6 with thin mint underline. Source box dark #1A2B3C rounded GENEROUS padding: white small bold '출처' + four white items: '· AAP HealthyChildren.org 2020-2023', '· 질병관리청 국가건강정보포털', '· CHKD Health Library 2024', '· PubMed 소아 알레르기비염 안전성 연구'. Thin white horizontal divider. Center: 소아과언니 white bold large, NO quotes, 4 characters only. Below: small gray 'DR.SOA UNNIE · 소아청소년과 전문의'. Thin white divider. Bottom area: white '@dr.soa_unnie · 매주 새 가이드'. Below: mint text '소아과수첩 앱 · 알레르기 증상 기록하기'. No pixel values. No quotes anywhere.
